parameters.query:
WITH owner_user AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM inbox.users
  WHERE telegram_user_id = $1::bigint
    AND status = 'active'
  LIMIT 1
),
candidate AS (
  SELECT
    id AS user_id,
    encode(digest($6::text, 'sha256'), 'hex') AS content_hash
  FROM owner_user
  WHERE $9::boolean
    AND nullif($6::text, '') IS NOT NULL
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.inbox_items (
    user_id,
    source,
    source_message_id,
    source_chat_id,
    source_url,
    content_type,
    raw_text,
    normalized_text,
    raw_payload,
    content_hash,
    status
  )
  SELECT
    candidate.user_id,
    'telegram',
    $2::text,
    $3::text,
    nullif($8::text, ''),
    $4::text,
    $5::text,
    $6::text,
    $7::jsonb,
    candidate.content_hash,
    'received'
  FROM candidate
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
),
existing AS (
  SELECT inbox_items.id
  FROM inbox.inbox_items
  JOIN owner_user ON owner_user.id = inbox_items.user_id
  WHERE (
      inbox_items.source = 'telegram'
      AND inbox_items.source_message_id = $2::text
    )
    OR inbox_items.content_hash = encode(digest($6::text, 'sha256'), 'hex')
  ORDER BY inbox_items.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM owner_user) AS authorized,
  $9::boolean AS supported,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT id FROM inserted LIMIT 1),
    (SELECT id FROM existing LIMIT 1)
  )::text AS item_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS created,
  $3::text AS source_chat_id,
  $4::text AS content_type,
  left($6::text, 180) AS preview;
